creator: eric@bsded.com
text:
On Thu, 2010-07-01 at 08:51 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of chinese/ibus-chewing,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/148276 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/148276
> 
Approved.
Sure! I submitted it.

-- 
Sent from my FreeBSD
